description: Lock herbal_medicine_preparation to broad plant-remedy preparation grounded in herbalism, with fermentation excluded as a universal prerequisite.

checks.reason: The node models preparation of medicinal plants, so herbal medicinal-plant knowledge is the direct prerequisite.
Pottery is retained only as a vessel/storage/heating enabler for some remedies, not as a universal hard requirement.
Fermented remedies are a possible subtype, not a direct prerequisite for broad herbal preparation or its downstream medical institutions.
